title: Compactible Mob Drops
description: Now you can compress mob drops into compact blocks to save space!
body:
Now you can compress all those overflowing mob drops into convenient storage blocks!
This mod introduces a system for compacting both common and rare mob drops, helping you keep your storage tidy and efficient. Whether you're drowning in drops from your farms or just want a cleaner way to stockpile resources, these compacted blocks are fully reversible — craft them back into original items anytime you want.

You can currently compress the following mob drops:
Leather, Rabbit Hide, String, Egg, Bone, Ink Sac, Glow Ink Sac, Feather, Turtle Scute, Armadillo Scute, Blaze Rod, Breeze Rod, Ender Pearl, and Shulker Shell.

Perfect for survival players, redstoners with auto-farms, or anyone who loves tidy storage systems!![1/2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d188225d2860916ef7d93e9690352e59c6841fe_0.webp)![1/2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a8b8c9ae4152552e5c3c85c559bed2f0729853f_0.webp)
